footer.tagline: Structured supplier information — capability, quality evidence and contact — organised the way procurement teams expect.
footer.provenance: Inferred from publicly available evidence and verified with you during onboarding. These are typically the fields where suppliers unlock the most buyer trust — we quantify them together from your production data.

contact.heading: Send us the drawing. We'll come back with a quote.

rfq.receivedBody: Thanks — our team will respond within 24–48 hours.
rfq.mailtoBody: Your email app should open with the details ready to send — just hit send. If nothing happens, email us directly at {email}.
rfq.projectPlaceholder: Parts, processes, materials, target volumes, target timeline…

errors.projectMin: Tell us a bit more about the project (20+ characters)

about.paragraph1: VCU International is an IATF 16949 and ISO 9001 certified manufacturer delivering precision metal and polymer components for global OEM programmes. With 16+ years of export experience across Vietnam and China, we support customers from prototype through to high-volume production.
about.paragraph2: Our integrated capabilities span CNC machining, casting, stamping, and injection moulding, supported by in-house CMM inspection and ERP-driven quality control. A single point of contact ensures consistency from initial design through to repeat delivery.
about.body: Trusted by global OEMs across automotive, aerospace, and industrial sectors.

customerLogos.intro: Long-running supply relationships across Automotive, Defence and Marine programmes.

capabilities.title: Manufacturing capabilities
capabilities.onboardingNote: To be quantified during supplier onboarding.

qualityKpis.title: Performance metrics
qualityKpis.intro: Real-time performance metrics from our integrated QMS
qualityKpis.footnote: * Inferred from public evidence. Quantified with your team during onboarding.

programmeDelivery.introTitle: From technical review to repeat delivery.
programmeDelivery.introSub: DFM review, launch-readiness checkpoints and delivery coordination — the unglamorous work that keeps OEM programmes on schedule.

buyers.subtitle: A single accountable technical interface from RFQ through repeat supply — with documented process routes and inspection aligned to OEM acceptance criteria.

processHighlights.title: Programmes we've delivered
processHighlights.intro: A small sample of parts carried from drawing through to repeat delivery — the detail your engineers will care about.
